title: Apprenticeships in England by industry characteristics: 2022 to 2023
body: "This release presents statistics on apprenticeship starts and achievements by:   employer size industry sector region   We have linked information about apprentices to their employers, using data from the:   individualised learner record apprenticeship service Office for National Statistics inter-departmental business register   The release covers learner characteristics, including:   age gender learners with learning difficulties or disabilities ethnicity whether they live in a relatively deprived area   It covers apprenticeship information, including:   level standard or framework subject studied geography of workplace whether they were supported by levy funds from an apprenticeship service account   It also covers employer enterprise characteristics, including:   industry sector size band legal status  "
